en: A: How’s the weather today?

ab: gahṟa’ haṟi’ ka kaṟal soni, papayux haṟi’ ma’abu’ ci use’ na makilux.
ch: B:天氣有點冷，要多喝熱水。
en: It’s a bit cold, so you need to drink more warm water.
How’s the weather today?

ab: makilux haṟi’ ka kaṟal soni, kapayux haṟi’ ma’abu’ ci use’.
en: It’s a bit hot, so you need to drink more water.
How’s the weather outside?

ab: yaba’ ka wagi’ soni taxi’ nak haṟi’.
en: The sun is bright and remember to wear sunscreen.
How’s the weather outside?

ab: paṟulungan wa, ungat wagi’ ka kaṟal.
en: There are a lot of clouds but no sun in the sky.
How is the weather tomorrow?

ab: ungat ka wagi’ cuxan, paṟulungan lu yaba’ ka behuṟ uṟi’.
ch: B:明天沒有太陽，雲很多，風很大。
en: It will be cloudy and windy but not sunny tomorrow.
How was the weather that day?

ab: gahṟa’ haṟi’ soni wa, palukus ci pababawen musa mamu tanux.
ch: B:這天有點冷，出門要穿外套。
en: It was a bit cold and you needed to wear a jacket when you went outside.
How’s the weather on the weekend?
It will be sunny on the weekend.
Will it be rainy that day?

ch: B:那天天氣晴朗，不會下雨。
en: It will have no rain and be sunny that day.
Will it be rainy that day?
Yes, it will be rainy that day.
Is it raining now?

ab: masot la, matata’ ka wagi’ la.
en: The rain stops and the sun comes out.
Is it raining now?

ab: umolax la, ini’ cu aras ci taṟasi.
en: It is raining and I don’t have an umbrella with me.
Is it raining outside?

ab: ini awalax micuw hang. gaben ka pawalax ni, aras ci taṟasi musa mamu tanux.
ch: B:現在沒有下雨，中午過後會下雨，出門要帶傘。
en: It is not raining now, but it will be rainy in the afternoon, so you need to bring an umbrella when you go out.
Will it be very cold in winter next year?

ab: ho’, pakagahṟa’ muhla’iy ka kukaṟal, papayux haṟi malukus.
ch: B:是，明年冬天會很冷，要穿很多衣服。
en: Yes, it will be very cold in winter next year, so you need to put on extra layers.
Will it be very hot in summer this year?

ab: ho’, pakakilux ka abagan, papayux ma’abu’ ci use’.
ch: B:是，夏天會很熱，要多喝水。
en: Yes, it will be very hot and you need to drink more water.

ab: sunkisli’ su ci kaṟal na pakabagan?
en: Do you like spring?

ab: hulhul ka kaṟal na pakabagan, kisli mu caṟung.
ch: B:我喜歡春天，天氣很溫暖。
en: I like spring because the weather is warm.

ab: sunkisli’ su ci kaṟal na pakmuhla’iy?
en: Do you like autumn?

ab: payux behuṟ ka pakmuhla’iy hiya’, aṟat mu kisli’.
ch: B:我不喜歡秋天，秋天有好多颱風。
en: I don’t like autumn because there are lots of typhoons in autumn.
